name: BIOMERICA INC
summary: Biomerica is a global biomedical technology company that develops, manufactures, and markets diagnostic test kits and therapeutic products. Its products analyze blood, urine, nasal, or fecal samples to diagnose diseases, food intolerances, and other conditions. Key products include inFoods IBS, a diagnostic-guided therapy using a blood test to identify IBS-triggering foods, and hp+detect, an FDA-cleared test for detecting Helicobacter pylori. Products are sold worldwide to clinical laboratories and point-of-care settings.

products.name: inFoods IBS
products.description: Patented diagnostic-guided therapy using a blood test to identify patient-specific foods that trigger IBS symptoms when eliminated from diet.

products.name: hp+detect
products.description: FDA 510(k)-cleared diagnostic test for detecting Helicobacter pylori bacteria and monitoring treatment effectiveness, marketed to laboratories.

products.name: Rapid Diagnostic Test Kits
products.description: Point-of-care and home-use rapid diagnostic tests analyzing blood, urine, nasal, or fecal samples for various diseases and conditions.

partnerships.description: Collaborating to pursue insurance reimbursement for the inFoods IBS product.

partnerships.partner_name: Largest GI group in the U.S. (unnamed)
partnerships.description: Collaboration to introduce inFoods IBS product to gastroenterology physician groups and gather real-world feedback.
